prompt_text:
### Demographics: 53-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 60.1 kg; Height 178.1 cm; BMI 18.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.2%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 8.3%), FPG (12 months ago 179mg/dL; 9 months ago 188mg/dL; 6 months ago 182mg/dL; 3 months ago 200mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 59.8kg; 9 months ago 60.7kg; 6 months ago 61.1kg; 3 months ago 60.8kg; current 60.1kg), Height (12 months ago 178.1cm; 9 months ago 178.1cm; 6 months ago 178.1cm; 3 months ago 178.1cm; current 178.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 18.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 124mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 68mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 68mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 99U/L; 9 months ago 107U/L; 6 months ago 107U/L; 3 months ago 101U/L; current 102U/L), AST (12 months ago 71U/L; 9 months ago 62U/L; 6 months ago 70U/L; 3 months ago 68U/L; current 65U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; current 24mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 265mg/g; 9 months ago 310mg/g; 6 months ago 472mg/g; 3 months ago 497mg/g; current 423mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 77mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 74mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 134mg/dL; 9 months ago 140mg/dL; 6 months ago 120mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 129mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.1g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.42 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
